title: Image-Based Canvas Background Themes
notes: Canvas background themes now use real image assets based on the approved concept boards instead of simplified CSS approximations.
Both Drill Log and Shot Diagram keep the same Canvas Background selector under Settings.
The former hazard-style concept is replaced by the Blast Placard theme.
Theme choices remain saved on the device and still apply immediately.
Shot Diagram recovery, Back to Menu, and desktop wheel zoom remain in place.
